title: ononis tridentata subsp. barrelieri
intro: Ononis tridentata subsp. barrelieri, also known as the Tridentate Burn Clover, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ononis tridentata subsp. barrelieri include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other joint-related issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce symptoms of various health conditions.
